authorization.decision: ADR 0001 CertificateProfile v1 closed enum vocabularies and unordered-set semantics
authorization.qualification: The slice defines only the PublicKeyAlgorithm domain vocabulary. It does not claim YAML parsing, schema admission, token rejection, canonical sorting, or either complete Gherkin scenario is implemented.
